name: Clan Dagger
description: This small dagger bears the gemstone of the bearer's dwarven clan. Every dwarf carries one at all times, and the bond between a dwarf and their clan dagger is intense. Selling your clan dagger is a social taboo and shameful act among dwarves.
sell_taboo_message: Selling your clan dagger is a social taboo and shameful act. This violates dwarven cultural norms and dishonors your clan. A GM must explicitly authorize this action.
